name: Hazy Flame Mantikor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>陽炎獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヘイズビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> メコレオス
desc: Your opponent cannot target this card with card effects. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can send 1 FIRE monster, except this card, from your hand or face-up from your side of the field to the Graveyard; this card cannot be destroyed by card effects this turn.
mnst_eff: Your opponent cannot target this card with card effects. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can send 1 FIRE monster, except this card, from your hand or face-up from your side of the field to the Graveyard; this card cannot be destroyed by card effects this turn.
eff: Your opponent cannot target this card with card effects. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can send 1 FIRE monster, except this card, from your hand or face-up from your side of the field to the Graveyard; this card cannot be destroyed by card effects this turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
